floater.name: prefs_kvtweaks
floater.title: ⚠ S24 ENGINE - ADVANCED TUNING
floater.text: ⚠ S24 ENGINE - EXPERT CONTROLS - MODIFY WITH CAUTION ⚠

slider.label: Reference CPU Freq for GPU Bias:
slider.name: cpu_gpu_balance

check_box.label: Keep Background Threads Active During Render
check_box.name: run_multiple_threads
check_box.tool_tip: If TRUE, keep background threads active during render

check_box.label: Multi-Threaded OpenGL Texture Loading
check_box.name: gl_multithread_textures
check_box.tool_tip: Use multiple GL contexts for texture loading (may reduce stutters, incompatible with Intel drivers)

check_box.label: Multi-Threaded OpenGL Media Playback
check_box.name: gl_multithread_media
check_box.tool_tip: Use multiple GL contexts for media playback (may reduce stutters, incompatible with Intel drivers)

panel.label: RAM Cache
panel.name: tab_ram_cache
panel.text: Fast RAM buffer for texture data passively received from GPU. Reduces disk I/O when textures are re-requested. User controls budget, thresholds, and eviction timing. Passive equilibrium system.

check_box.label: Enable KVRAM Cache (User-Configurable Texture Buffer)
check_box.name: kvram_cache_enabled
check_box.tool_tip: Enable RAM buffer for texture data received from GPU (reduces disk I/O on texture re-requests)

panel.text: ⚠ Requires relog to take effect. Recommended: 16GB+ system RAM.

slider.name: kvram_ram_budget
slider.tool_tip: RAM allocated for texture buffer - stores textures passively received from GPU (256 MB - 4 GB in 256 MB steps)

slider.name: kvram_soft_threshold
slider.tool_tip: Start gentle RAM→Disk eviction when buffer reaches this usage level (50%-100%)

slider.name: kvram_hard_threshold
slider.tool_tip: Force aggressive RAM→Disk eviction when buffer reaches this usage level (70%-100%)

slider.name: kvram_retention_time
slider.tool_tip: Minimum retention time - textures must be in cache this long before eligible for eviction (0.1-30 seconds in 0.1 second steps)

slider.name: kvram_min_deck_size
slider.tool_tip: Minimum textures in deck (100-10000 in 100 steps). Higher = more guaranteed cache hits before rotation begins.

check_box.label: Enable Debug Logging (Verbose)
check_box.name: kvram_debug_logging
check_box.tool_tip: Enable detailed logging of evictions, queries, and pressure (performance impact)

panel.text: ℹ️ How It Works: GPU passively sends texture data to RAM buffer → RAM holds for fast re-delivery to GPU when requested → After grace period expires AND buffer exceeds threshold, oldest textures evict to disk. User configures all timing, thresholds, and budget limits. Clean startup with empty cache.

spinner.label: Auto-Mute Avatar Complexity:
spinner.name: auto_mute_complexity
spinner.tool_tip: Automatically mute avatars exceeding this complexity (0=disabled)

spinner.label: Auto-Mute Surface Area Limit (m²):
spinner.name: auto_mute_surface_area
spinner.tool_tip: Automatically mute avatars exceeding this surface area

check_box.label: Proactively Flush Orphaned Textures on Teleport (Experimental)
check_box.name: flush_orphaned_textures_on_teleport
check_box.tool_tip: Evicts textures left behind by a region-change teleport immediately instead of waiting on the slow background cleanup. Off by default -- testing linked this to avatar rendering flakiness and lower framerate in heavy scenes.

spinner.label: SSAO Scale:
spinner.name: ssao_scale
spinner.tool_tip: Base scale for screen-space ambient occlusion effect

spinner.label: SSAO Max Scale:
spinner.name: ssao_max_scale
spinner.tool_tip: Maximum scale limit for SSAO effect

spinner.label: SSAO Factor:
spinner.name: ssao_factor
spinner.tool_tip: Intensity factor for ambient occlusion

spinner.label: SSAO Effect Strength:
spinner.name: ssao_effect
spinner.tool_tip: Overall strength/visibility of SSAO effect

spinner.label: Bumpmap Min Distance²:
spinner.name: bumpmap_min_dist
spinner.tool_tip: Minimum distance² to render bump maps (reduce for better detail)

check_box.label: Enable VBO Work Queue
check_box.name: enable_vbo_work_queue
check_box.tool_tip: EXPERIMENTAL: defer VBO pool storage allocation (cache-miss buffer creation) to background GL worker thread(s) via a shared-context work queue. Off by default - the main thread still blocks per allocation to stay correct, so treat this as a testing toggle, not a guaranteed frame time win.

spinner.label: Worker Threads:
spinner.name: vbo_work_queue_threads
spinner.tool_tip: Number of shared GL context worker threads for the VBO work queue (1-4). 1 is recommended: the queue synchronizes each job with its own fence, but with more than one worker, jobs can still complete out of order relative to when the main thread needed them.

panel.label: SSR
panel.name: tab_ssr

slider.label: SSR Ray March Iterations:
slider.name: ssr_iterations
slider.tool_tip: Number of ray marching steps. Higher = better quality but lower performance.

slider.label: SSR Glossy Samples:
slider.name: ssr_glossy_samples
slider.tool_tip: Samples for glossy reflections. Higher = smoother but slower.

slider.label: SSR Ray Step Size:
slider.name: ssr_ray_step
slider.tool_tip: Step size for ray marching. Larger = longer distance, less accuracy.

slider.label: SSR Distance Bias:
slider.name: ssr_dist_bias
slider.tool_tip: Bias to apply when rejecting samples based on distance.

spinner.label: SSR Adaptive Step Multiplier:
spinner.name: ssr_adaptive_mult
spinner.tool_tip: Multiplier for adaptive ray step sizing. Higher = faster but less accurate.

panel.text: These settings override the global SSR settings above when rendering water surfaces, allowing you to optimize water reflection quality independently.

slider.label: Water SSR Iterations:
slider.name: water_ssr_iterations
slider.tool_tip: Ray march iterations for water. Lower than global SSR to improve water performance. Set to 0 to disable water SSR.

slider.label: Water SSR Ray Step:
slider.name: water_ssr_raystep
slider.tool_tip: Step size for water reflections. Adjust to balance distance vs accuracy.

panel.label: Water
panel.name: tab_water
panel.text: Water Material Properties (S24 - Unlock Hardcoded Values)

slider.label: Water Metallic Factor:
slider.name: water_metallic
slider.tool_tip: Controls water metallicness. 1.0=fully reflective metal-like, 0.35=minimum (lower values cause whiteout). HARDCODED as 1.0 in stock viewer!

slider.label: Water Roughness Override:
slider.name: water_roughness_override
slider.tool_tip: Direct roughness control. 0.0=use environment blur, 0.01-0.60=override (higher values cause whiteout).

slider.label: Reflection Intensity:
slider.name: water_reflection_intensity
slider.tool_tip: Global multiplier for water reflections. 1.0=default, 0.0=no reflections, 3.0=maximum mirror effect.

slider.label: Specular Highlight Intensity:
slider.name: water_specular_intensity
slider.tool_tip: Multiplier for sun/moon specular highlights on water. Higher=brighter sparkles.

slider.label: Red Channel:
slider.name: water_color_tint_r
slider.tool_tip: Red tint (1.0=neutral, <1.0=less red, >1.0=more red)

slider.label: Green Channel:
slider.name: water_color_tint_g
slider.tool_tip: Green tint (1.0=neutral, <1.0=less green, >1.0=more green). Try 1.2 for tropical turquoise!

slider.label: Blue Channel:
slider.name: water_color_tint_b
slider.tool_tip: Blue tint (1.0=neutral, <1.0=less blue, >1.0=more blue). Boost for deep ocean look!

slider.label: Tint Strength (Alpha):
slider.name: water_color_tint_a
slider.tool_tip: Tint strength/opacity. 0.0=no tint effect, 1.0=full tint applied

slider.label: Fresnel Power Curve:
slider.name: water_fresnel_power
slider.tool_tip: HARDCODED as 2.0 in stock viewer! 1.0=soft linear, 2.0=normal, 4.0=sharp dramatic edges

slider.label: Wave Animation Speed:
slider.name: water_wave_speed
slider.tool_tip: 0.5=slow calm water, 1.0=normal, 2.0=fast stormy chop. 0.0=freeze animation

slider.label: Shore Transition Distance:
slider.name: water_shore_fade_distance
slider.tool_tip: HARDCODED as 60 in stock viewer! Lower=softer beach, Higher=sharper rocky coast

slider.label: Underwater Fog Multiplier:
slider.name: water_underwater_fog_mult
slider.tool_tip: Controls underwater visibility. 0.3=crystal clear, 1.0=normal, 3.0=very murky. Doesn't affect above-water fog.

slider.label: Reflection Color Temperature:
slider.name: water_reflection_warmth
slider.tool_tip: <1.0=cool/cold moonlight, 1.0=neutral, >1.0=warm golden hour. Artistic color grading.

panel.text: Screen Space Reflections (duplicated from SSR tab):

slider.label: Water SSR Iterations:
slider.name: water_ssr_iterations_dup
slider.tool_tip: Ray march iterations for water SSR. 0=disable water SSR.

slider.label: Water SSR Ray Step:
slider.name: water_ssr_raystep_dup
slider.tool_tip: Step size for water SSR ray marching.

combo_box.name: WaterPresetCombo
combo_box.tool_tip: Select a water shader preset to load it instantly

button.label: Save
button.name: WaterPresetSave
button.tool_tip: Save current water settings as a new preset

spinner.label: Shadow Bias:
spinner.name: shadow_bias
spinner.tool_tip: Adjust shadow depth bias to reduce shadow acne or peter-panning

spinner.label: Shadow Offset:
spinner.name: shadow_offset
spinner.tool_tip: Offset shadow projection to fine-tune shadow positioning

check_box.label: Enable Dynamic Cascade Throttling
check_box.name: shadow_throttle_enabled
check_box.tool_tip: When enabled, distant shadow cascades update less frequently when camera is still. Improves performance without visible quality loss. Disable for traditional fixed-rate updates.

spinner.label: Throttle Settle Frames:
spinner.name: shadow_throttle_settle
spinner.tool_tip: Frames to wait after camera stops before throttling activates. Higher values reduce flicker on slow systems.

spinner.label: Shadow Bias Error (Altitude):
spinner.name: shadow_bias_error
spinner.tool_tip: Altitude-based shadow bias adjustment

spinner.label: Shadow Offset Error (Altitude):
spinner.name: shadow_offset_error
spinner.tool_tip: Altitude-based shadow offset adjustment

spinner.label: Max Local Lights:
spinner.name: max_local_lights
spinner.tool_tip: Maximum number of local lights to render (0=unlimited)

check_box.label: ⚡ Enable S24 HardLight Mode (Camera-Priority)
check_box.name: s24_hardlight_mode
check_box.tool_tip: S24 - Reserves hardware light slots for lights closest to camera and in view. Dramatically improves avatar lighting stability in complex scenes. OFF = Traditional LL behavior (selected lights bypass distance, distant lights can steal slots).

spinner.label: Spotlight Shadow Bias:
spinner.name: spot_shadow_bias
spinner.tool_tip: Depth bias for spotlight shadows (reduce acne/peter-panning)

spinner.label: Spotlight Shadow Offset:
spinner.name: spot_shadow_offset
spinner.tool_tip: Projection offset for spotlight shadows

check_box.label: Enable Smart Distance-Based Culling
check_box.name: local_light_smart_culling
check_box.tool_tip: Prioritize nearby lights, gradually cull distant lights for better performance

slider.label: Priority Inner Radius (m):
slider.name: local_light_inner_radius
slider.tool_tip: Lights within this distance are always rendered (0-30m default)

slider.label: Priority Mid Radius (m):
slider.name: local_light_mid_radius
slider.tool_tip: Lights in this zone (30-64m default) have gradual culling based on intensity

check_box.label: Enable Frustum Culling
check_box.name: local_light_frustum_culling
check_box.tool_tip: Deprioritize lights outside camera view (especially behind camera)

slider.label: Frustum Cull Distance (m):
slider.name: local_light_frustum_cull_dist
slider.tool_tip: Only apply frustum culling to lights beyond this distance (default 64m)

spinner.label: Force Discard Level:
spinner.name: texture_discard_level
spinner.tool_tip: Force lower-resolution textures. 0=full quality, higher=lower quality (saves VRAM)

check_box.label: Force Full Resolution Textures (Ignore Discard)
check_box.name: force_full_res
check_box.tool_tip: Always load textures at highest resolution regardless of other settings

spinner.label: Max Texture Resolution:
spinner.name: max_texture_res
spinner.tool_tip: Maximum allowed texture resolution in pixels (per dimension)

spinner.label: HTTP Fetch Concurrency (0=Auto):
spinner.name: texture_fetch_threads
spinner.tool_tip: Number of concurrent HTTP threads for texture downloads. 0=auto-scale (16), 1-64=manual override. S24: Raised from 16→64 max for modern systems

check_box.label: Enable HTTP Byte-Range Texture Fetching
check_box.name: byte_range_fetch
check_box.tool_tip: Use HTTP range requests for progressive texture loading

spinner.label: Reverse Byte-Range Size:
spinner.name: reverse_byte_range
spinner.tool_tip: Size of reverse byte-range requests for texture headers (0=disabled)

spinner.label: Max HUD Textures:
spinner.name: hud_textures_warn
spinner.tool_tip: Warn when HUD exceeds this many textures

spinner.label: Max HUD Oversized Textures:
spinner.name: hud_oversized_warn
spinner.tool_tip: Warn when HUD exceeds this many oversized textures

spinner.label: Max HUD Texture Memory (MB):
spinner.name: hud_texture_mem_warn
spinner.tool_tip: Warn when HUD textures exceed this memory usage

spinner.label: Max Bandwidth (kbps, 50 Mbps max):
spinner.name: max_bandwidth
spinner.tool_tip: S24: Maximum network bandwidth in kbps. Raised from 10 Mbps to 50 Mbps for modern fiber connections (1.6Gbps+). Recommend 20000-40000 for fast connections.

spinner.label: ACK Collection Time (sec):
spinner.name: ack_collect_time
spinner.tool_tip: Time to collect ACK messages before sending (affects network efficiency)

check_box.label: Use Separate Thread for Plugin Reading
check_box.name: plugin_read_thread
check_box.tool_tip: Offload plugin I/O to dedicated thread

spinner.label: Plugin CPU Usage Limit:
spinner.name: plugin_cpu_limit
spinner.tool_tip: Maximum CPU usage by plugins as fraction (0=disabled, 0.90=90%)

check_box.label: Show streaming audio metadata
check_box.name: show_stream_metadata
check_box.tool_tip: Display song title and artist from streaming audio (Shoutcast/Icecast) as notifications

combo_box.item.label: Media Plugins (libVLC) - Better codecs, 10-band EQ, Metadata
combo_box.item.name: media_plugins

check_box.label: Enable 3-band equalizer (FMOD engine)
check_box.name: audio_eq_enabled
check_box.tool_tip: Enable a 3-band equalizer to adjust bass, mid, and treble frequencies (FMOD streaming engine only)

check_box.label: Enable 10-band equalizer (VLC engine)
check_box.name: vlc_audio_eq_enabled
check_box.tool_tip: Enable advanced 10-band parametric equalizer with preamp (MediaPlugins/VLC streaming engine only)

slider.name: vlc_eq_preamp
slider.tool_tip: Preamp: -20 to +20 dB

slider.name: vlc_eq_band0
slider.tool_tip: 60 Hz: -20 to +20 dB

slider.name: vlc_eq_band4
slider.tool_tip: 1 kHz: -20 to +20 dB

slider.name: vlc_eq_band5
slider.tool_tip: 3 kHz: -20 to +20 dB

slider.name: vlc_eq_band6
slider.tool_tip: 6 kHz: -20 to +20 dB

slider.name: vlc_eq_band7
slider.tool_tip: 12 kHz: -20 to +20 dB

slider.name: vlc_eq_band8
slider.tool_tip: 14 kHz: -20 to +20 dB

slider.name: vlc_eq_band9
slider.tool_tip: 16 kHz: -20 to +20 dB

panel.text: Range: -20dB to +20dB per band (0 = flat/no change)

panel.label: Experimental
panel.name: tab_experimental

check_box.label: Enable GLTF Support (⚠ May Auto-Upload Assets)
check_box.name: enable_gltf
check_box.tool_tip: WARNING: Can trigger implicit texture uploads costing L$. Setting is now persistent across restarts.

panel.text: ⚠ PERSISTENT SETTING: May upload textures without confirmation, costing L$

check_box.label: Show Emoji Icons in Menu Bar
check_box.name: use_menu_icons
check_box.tool_tip: Display emoji icons next to menu labels. Changes take effect on next viewer restart.

panel.text: Enhanced selection beam for builders - crisp GL line core with customizable particle glow. Professional visual feedback when editing objects. Toggle between classic particles, clean line, or hybrid "lightsaber" effect with smooth fade-in/fade-out!

panel.label: Reflections
panel.name: tab_reflections
panel.text: ⚠ If Tweaks Do Nothing: Purge Shader Cache! ⚠
If reflection adjustments have no effect, go to RESETS tab → Purge Shader Cache → Restart viewer. This rebuilds shaders with current settings. After that, all sliders work instantly!

slider.name: probe_intensity_slider
slider.tool_tip: Brightness: 0=off, 1=normal, 10=extreme HDR

slider.name: probe_saturation_slider
slider.tool_tip: Color: 0=gray, 1=normal, 5=vivid

slider.name: probe_contrast_slider
slider.tool_tip: Contrast: low=soft, 1=normal, high=dramatic

slider.name: probe_blur_slider
slider.tool_tip: Blur: negative=sharp, 0=normal, positive=soft

slider.name: probe_ambient_slider
slider.tool_tip: Ambient: 0=dark, 1=normal, 10=bright glow

check_box.label: Enable Reflection Probes
check_box.name: enable_reflection_probes
check_box.tool_tip: Master toggle - completely enables/disables probe system. Requires shader rebuild!

panel.text: • Lower Intensity for subtle looks • Lower Saturation to remove sky color indoors • Increase Blur for softer reflections • Lower Ambient for darker mood • Share exact values in forums!

panel.label: Resets
panel.name: tab_resets
panel.text: ⚠ Restart HIGHLY recommended for most operations, ESSENTIAL for shader cache! Some operations (RAM cache, settings) are immediate.

button.label: Reset KVTweaks to Defaults
button.name: reset_kvtweaks_btn
button.tool_tip: Reset all KVTweaks settings to factory defaults (immediate effect)

panel.text: Resets all tuning settings to defaults. Immediate effect.

button.label: Purge Shader Cache
button.name: purge_shader_cache_btn
button.tool_tip: Delete all compiled shaders for fresh rebuild (RESTART REQUIRED)

button.label: Purge CEF Cache
button.name: purge_cef_cache_btn
button.tool_tip: Clear Chromium Embedded Framework (web browser) cache (restart recommended)

button.label: Purge RAM Cache
button.name: purge_ram_cache_btn
button.tool_tip: Clear passive texture buffer in RAM (immediate effect)

panel.text: Clear KVRAM user-configurable texture buffer. Immediate effect.

button.label: ⚠ FACTORY RESET EVERYTHING ⚠
button.name: factory_reset_btn
button.tool_tip: DANGER: Purges ALL caches, ALL settings, returns to FIRST RUN state (requires restart)

panel.text: ⚠ DANGER: Deletes ALL caches and settings! Returns viewer to first-run state. Last resort only!

panel.label: Movement
panel.name: tab_movement

check_box.label: Enable Ground Movement Smoothing
check_box.name: enable_smooth_movement
check_box.tool_tip: Smooth acceleration/deceleration for walking and running

slider.name: smooth_movement_accel_time
slider.tool_tip: Time to reach full speed when walking/running

slider.name: smooth_movement_decel_time
slider.tool_tip: Time to come to a stop when walking/running

panel.text: Reduces flight control sensitivity and eliminates overshoot. Makes flying feel controlled and precise instead of twitchy!

check_box.label: Enable Flight Movement Smoothing
check_box.name: enable_smooth_flight
check_box.tool_tip: Smooth acceleration/deceleration for flight controls - reduces overshoot

slider.name: smooth_flight_accel_time
slider.tool_tip: Time to reach full flight speed

slider.name: smooth_flight_decel_time
slider.tool_tip: Time to come to a stop when flying

slider.name: smooth_flight_fast_threshold
slider.tool_tip: Threshold to trigger fast movement (lower = more responsive)

slider.name: smooth_flight_min_threshold
slider.tool_tip: Dead zone before any movement starts - higher = more damping of initial boost

panel.text:
Movement smoothing adds analog-style ramping to keyboard controls:
• GROUND: For walking/running smoothness • FLIGHT: For controlled, precise flying without overshoot • LOWER VALUES: More responsive but potentially jerky • HIGHER VALUES: Smoother but less immediate response

button.label: Reset Movement Defaults
button.name: reset_movement_btn
button.tool_tip: Reset all movement smoothing settings to defaults
